name: TBDC DB
description: Read/write access to the TBDC Investor Matchmaking Postgres database, scoped to the tbdc_assistant role. Every write requires an actingUserId and appends to the AuditLog.

databaseUrl.description: Postgres connection string for the tbdc_assistant role.

assistantUserEmail.description: Email of the assistant User row (used as actorUserId in AuditLog). Defaults to assistant@tbdc.ready4vc.com.
